buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @storige/types build && pnpm --filter @storige/canvas-core build && pnpm --filter @storige/editor build
ignoreCommand: P="${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA}"; if [ -z "$P" ] || ! git cat-file -e "$P^{commit}" 2>/dev/null; then exit 1; fi; git diff --quiet "$P" HEAD ./ ../../packages/types ../../packages/canvas-core ../../packages/ui

headers.value: frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.papascompany.co.kr https://*.bookmoa.co.kr https://www.bookmoa.co.kr https://*.vercel.app http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5174 http://localhost:3000 http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:5174 http://127.0.0.1:3000
